image.description: Product image or cutout (JPEG, PNG, WEBP, max 12MB)
image.title: Image

scene_image.description: Reference scene image to place the product in
scene_image.title: Scene Image

placement_type.description: How to place the product: 'original' (keep size/position), 'automatic' (auto-fit), or 'manual_placement'
placement_type.title: Placement Type

manual_padding.description: Manual padding when placement_type='manual_placement': {'left': int, 'right': int, 'top': int, 'bottom': int}
manual_padding.title: Manual Padding

num_results.description: Number of result images to generate (1-4)
num_results.title: Num Results

content_moderation.description: Apply content moderation to input and output images
content_moderation.title: Content Moderation

force_rmbg.description: Force background removal even if image has alpha channel
force_rmbg.title: Force Rmbg
